posts.author: deniseblanco (Denise)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

Is it possible to have a Workdoc template open whenever a new task is created using the board form? Basically, we are using the form to Intake creative requests but would like to have a Creative Brief automatically created for every request as well.

Thanks!

posts.author: Tevans (Tom Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever solve this? I’m trying to achieve something similar by the sounds of it.
